prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of HON stock, which typically exhibits moderate volatility with annualized standard deviation around 25-30%. The point estimate assumes slight upward drift consistent with long-term equity returns. Confidence intervals are constructed using Monte Carlo simulation incorporating typical daily returns distribution, accounting for the 21-day time horizon. The widening intervals reflect increasing uncertainty over longer time periods, with the 90% CI capturing approximately 3.2 standard deviations from the mean prediction.
